# NETSHARPDEV

> Developer blog by Paweł Pindel, Principal Software Engineer at Verisk Analytics.

## About

This site covers Azure, .NET, software architecture, and modern cloud-native development.
The author shares insights, opinions, and real-world solutions from professional experience.

## Content

- Blog posts on Azure services, .NET development, and software architecture
- Portfolio of professional projects
- About the author

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://netsharpdev.com/
- RSS Feed: https://netsharpdev.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://netsharpdev.com/sitemap.xml
- About: https://netsharpdev.com/about/
- Portfolio: https://netsharpdev.com/portfolio/
